common.footer: © {year} MedSupply Import & Distribution LLC — US parent & Burkina Faso subsidiary.

home.title:
Reliable pharmaceutical supply
for the Sahel region.
home.subtitle: We connect WHO-GMP certified Indian manufacturers with clinics, pharmacies and NGOs across West Africa. Quality-assured antibiotics, antimalarials, pediatric syrups, IV fluids and consumables — stability-tested for hot climates.
home.feature1_body: Every supplier is vetted against WHO-GMP standards with documented COA and stability data before being approved.
home.feature2_body: Stability tested for hot climates, compliant with DGPML import requirements, delivered through our Burkina Faso operations.
home.feature3_body: From PO to import authorization to client delivery — every batch is traceable with full documentation.

about.title: About MedSupply Import & Distribution LLC
about.intro: MedSupply Import & Distribution LLC is a pharmaceutical import and distribution company with a US parent entity and a fully licensed subsidiary in Burkina Faso. We exist to close the supply gap for essential medicines in the Sahel and broader West Africa.
about.region_body: Headquartered in the United States with operational base in Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso, we serve clinics, pharmacies, and NGOs across Burkina Faso and West Africa. Our logistics network is designed for the unique infrastructure challenges of the Sahel corridor.
about.us_body: Corporate parent — regulatory strategy, manufacturer relationships, and financing.
about.bf_body: Import licensing, DGPML compliance, warehousing, and last-mile distribution across Burkina Faso and neighboring countries.
about.who_gmp_body: All products are sourced exclusively from manufacturers holding valid WHO-GMP certification. We verify certificates and audit production sites.
about.dgpml_body: Our Burkina Faso subsidiary holds full import authorization from the Direction Générale de la Pharmacie, du Médicament et des Laboratoires (DGPML).
about.qa_body: Certificate of Analysis (COA) for every batch, stability data for Zone IVb (hot/humid), and full traceability from manufacturer to end client.

products.title: Product Catalog
products.subtitle: WHO-GMP sourced essential medicines, stability-tested for hot climates. All products come with full COA and traceability documentation.
products.empty: No products match the selected filters.
products.error: Could not load catalog. Please try again later.

manufacturers.title: For Manufacturers
manufacturers.intro: We partner with WHO-GMP certified Indian pharmaceutical manufacturers to supply essential medicines to the Sahel and West African markets. If you produce quality generics and want to expand into Francophone Africa, we're your distribution partner.
manufacturers.step1_body: We identify demand for specific molecules and formulations based on our client network across Burkina Faso and neighboring countries.
manufacturers.step2_body: We verify WHO-GMP certificates, request COAs for each batch, and require Zone IVb stability data for hot climate suitability.
manufacturers.step3_body: We issue purchase orders with clear volume commitments, handle DGPML import authorization, and manage sea/air freight to Ouagadougou.
manufacturers.criteria1: Valid WHO-GMP or PIC/S certification for relevant product lines
manufacturers.criteria2: Ability to provide Zone IVb stability data (40°C/75% RH)
manufacturers.criteria3: Capacity for volume orders (typically 10,000–100,000 units per SKU)
manufacturers.criteria4: Willingness to provide French-language labeling or accept our labeling specs
manufacturers.criteria5: Competitive FOB pricing with transparent cost breakdown
manufacturers.cta_body: Apply as a supplier and our sourcing team will review your product portfolio within 5 business days.

buyers.title: For Buyers
buyers.intro: Whether you run a private clinic, hospital pharmacy, NGO health program, or retail pharmacy — we supply WHO-GMP quality medicines with full documentation and traceability.
buyers.step1_body: Submit your organization details and import license (if applicable).
buyers.step2_body: Access our full catalog with real-time stock levels and place purchase orders.
buyers.step3_body: Receive proforma invoice, COA, and import docs. We handle DGPML authorization.
buyers.step4_body: Products delivered to your location in Ouagadougou or shipped to regional destinations.
buyers.min_order_body: 500,000 FCFA (~$800 USD) per order for local stock items. Custom import orders start at 5,000,000 FCFA (~$8,000 USD).
buyers.lead_times_body: Local stock: 1–3 business days. Import orders: 8–12 weeks (sea freight) or 3–4 weeks (air freight, surcharge applies).
buyers.docs_body: Every delivery includes: batch-level COA, import authorization copy, packing list, and commercial invoice. Cold chain items include temperature logs.
buyers.cta_body: Request a buyer account and our team will verify your organization within 2 business days.
